title: Fermented Mozza Crunchy Halal
description: This light Chinese dish features soft mozzarella balls marinated in a tangy sauce and crispy fried to perfection.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together soy sauce, mirin, sugar and vegetable oil until sugar dissolves. Add mozzarella balls to the marinade; cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Dredge each ball in cornstarch first, then Panko breadcrumbs.

Heat enough oil in a deep pan over medium-high heat to reach 375°F (190°C). Carefully place marinated mozzarella balls into the hot oil. Fry until golden brown and crispy on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove from the pan with a slotted spoon and serve immediately.
